_notes: Copy this file to DriverMap.json and add overrides as needed.
DriverMap.json is excluded from the repository - this example file is the template.
This file is an escape hatch for edge cases where the auto-scoring engine
picks the wrong driver pack. In normal operation with standard ZIP naming
you do not need to add any entries here.
Mappings is an array of objects. Each object maps a model key to either
a ZipFile (filename on the share) or a DriverFolder (pre-extracted folder name).
The model key is the lowercase WMI model string with spaces replaced by hyphens.
To find your model key: boot into WinPE and check the deploy.log,
